bio.name: Ayushi Aggarwal
bio.tagline: I build things that actually get used.
bio.description: Not prototypes that live on GitHub. Not decks that explain what I'm planning to build. Products with real users, real logins, and real businesses depending on them daily. I left Ericsson because I wanted to build something of my own. So I did. And I'm not done yet.
bio.brandBuilder: I run Merkri Media - a brand building agency helping B2B founders stop being the best-kept secret in their industry.

featuredProjects.title: The Tomorrows Team — Active Community
featuredProjects.summary: A platform for people serious about communication, confidence, and showing up prepared. It began as offline sessions for people who wanted to get better at speaking, thinking, and showing up in rooms that matter. When it grew, I built a focused community platform where members work on real communication skills together – with structured programs, peer accountability, and a founder who's in the trenches with them.

hackathons.title: Deep Researcher Agent — 🏆 1st Place
hackathons.outcome: AI-powered research platform with specialized agents for comprehensive deep research. Built a multi-agent research platform where you upload documents, pick a research mode, and let specialized agents do the heavy lifting. The Searcher finds relevant sources. The Summarizer condenses long content. The Fact-Checker verifies claims.

hackathons.title: Travel Ease — 🏆 1st Place
hackathons.outcome: Your AI travel agent. Itinerary, flights, hotels, weather, food - everything. Travel planning is genuinely painful – you're jumping between 6 different tabs comparing prices manually. One conversation handles everything. Tell it where you want to go, your budget, and your vibe. It builds a coherent itinerary, checks weather, suggests food, and finds bookable options – all in one place. Zero agency fees.

productionWork.summary: Built for a manufacturer tracking 40+ field reps in real time.
productionWork.impact: I built a dedicated field sales tracker where reps open the app, share their live location before any meeting, log detailed discussion points, and mark client interest level. Managers get a real-time dashboard showing rep locations, meeting history, and deal pipeline - one source of truth, zero manual tracking. Now running across 10 companies with 50+ daily active reps.

productionWork.summary: Points. Commissions. Bikes. A loyalty system for the people who actually sell your product.
productionWork.impact: In building materials, carpenters decide which brand gets installed. I built this for a real 30-year-old B2B manufacturing business. Carpenters scan at point of sale, points update instantly. SMS Integration for reward notifications without an app. Live in production with 300+ carpenters earning bikes and appliances.
